mapper.select: SELECT DM.DELY_NM , DM.RECIPIENT_NM , DM.RECIPIENT_DEPT_NM , DM.RECIPIENT_TEL_NUM AS RECIPIENT_TEL_NUM , DM.RECIPIENT_CELL_NUM AS RECIPIENT_CELL_NUM , DM.RECIPIENT_EMAIL AS RECIPIENT_EMAIL , DM.DELY_ZIP_CD AS DELY_ZIP_CD , DM.DELY_ADDR_1 AS DELY_ADDR_1 , DM.DELY_ADDR_2 AS DELY_ADDR_2 , DM.DELY_RMK , DM.CUST_CD , DM.USER_ID USER_ID , DM.SEQ FROM STOCCUDM DM WHERE DM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DM.CUST_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND DM.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND DM.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY DM.SEQ

SELECT CVUR.GATE_CD , CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM , CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM_ENG , CVUR.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , CVUR.EMAIL AS EMAIL , CVUR.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , CVUR.CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM , CVUR.FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM , 'KO' AS LANG_CD , 'KR' AS COUNTRY_CD , 'GMT+09:00' AS GMT_CD , '01' AS USER_DATE_FORMAT_CD , '01' AS USER_NUMBER_FORMAT_CD , CVUR.SMS_FLAG , CVUR.MAIL_FLAG , CVUR.POSITION_NM , CVUR.DUTY_NM AS DUTY_NM , CVUR.PW_RESET_FLAG , (CASE WHEN CVUR.PW_RESET_DATE <= SYSDATE - 90 THEN 'N' WHEN CVUR.PW_RESET_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS RESET_VALIDATE_FLAG , UPPER(SF_TRIM( CVUR.USER_ID )) AS USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) ' / ' (CVUR.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_INFO , getUserName(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.CHIEF_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CHIEF_USER_NM , CVUR.CHIEF_USER_ID AS CHIEF_USER_ID , (CVUR.DEPT_NM, (SELECT OGDP.DEPT_NM FROM STOCOGDP OGDP WHERE OGDP.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND OGDP.BUYER_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND OGDP.DEPT_CD = CVUR.DEPT_CD)) AS DEPT_NM ,CUST.CUST_NM AS COMPANY_NM ,(SELECT LISTAGG(CO.CTRL_NM,', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY CO.CTRL_NM) FROM STOCBACO CO LEFT JOIN STOCBACP CP ON (CO.GATE_CD = CP.GATE_CD AND CO.CTRL_CD = CP.CTRL_CD) WHERE CO.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND CP.CTRL_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID AND CO.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CP.USE_FLAG = '1') AS CTRL_NM FROM STOCCVUR CVUR LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{ses.userId}
AND CVUR.PASSWORD = #{P_PASSWORD}
